title: gonocaryum macrocarpum
benefits: Gonocaryum macrocarpum has many benefits, such as being used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant's extracts have also been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing pain and swelling in joints and muscles. Additionally, Gonocaryum macrocarpum has been found to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating infections and promoting wound healing. By harnessing the medicinal properties of this plant, individuals can experience improved overall health, increased energy levels, and enhanced quality of life.
side_effects: Gonocaryum macrocarpum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its emetic properties when ingested in large quantities. Ingestion of the plant's seeds has also been linked to gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and abdominal pain. Additionally, improper use of the plant has been associated with allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues, such as wheezing and shortness of breath. Furthermore, Gonocaryum macrocarpum can also interact with certain medications, potentially leading to adverse effects.
